pi_items.source: Verified against task description and export_result.sh logic.
Verified against task description, export_result.sh extraction query, and OSEHRA documentation confirming this is the TIU Document Definition global.
Verified against task description requirement "Identify at least 5 distinct entries" and verifier.py logic where max score requires 5 entries (valid_entries_found * 8, max 40).
Contradicted by verifier.py logic which awards up to 20 points for file existence/creation and only 10 points for app running.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic VEHU VistA dataset to explore the ^TIU(8925.1) Document Definition global. The target output file is /home/ga/Documents/tiu_titles_report.txt, requiring at least 5 title entries. The verifier logic contradicts the claimed scoring weights in the metadata, actually awarding 20 points for file creation and 10 for app running, instead of the claimed 10 and 20 respectively.
